creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Mar 17 11:47:46 UTC 2018
New revision: 464805
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/464805

Log:
  Add lua-stdlib-normalize 2.0.1

  - While I'm here:
    - Add NO_ARCH
    - Add missing OPTIONS_DEFINE=DOCS
    - Convert to options target helper
    - Remove LICENSE_FILE from PORTDOCS

  This is a collection of normalized lua functions for Lua 5.1 (including LuaJIT),
  5.2 and 5.3.

  WWW: https://github.com/lua-stdlib/normalize

  PR:		226589
  Submitted by:	Kan Sasaki <sasaki@fcc.ad.jp>

Changes:
  head/devel/Makefile
  head/devel/lua-stdlib-normalize/
  head/devel/lua-stdlib-normalize/Makefile
  head/devel/lua-stdlib-normalize/distinfo
  head/devel/lua-stdlib-normalize/pkg-descr
  head/devel/lua-stdlib-normalize/pkg-plist
